problem.title: 2. Reverse Linked List
problem.problemStatement: Given the head of a singly linked list, reverse the list, and return the reversed list.
problem.constraints:
• The number of nodes in the list is the range [0, 5000].
  • -5000 <= Node.val <= 5000
problem.handlerFunction: e=>{try{let t=[[1,2,3,4,5],[5,4,3,2,1],[1,2,3],[1]],r=[[5,4,3,2,1],[1,2,3,4,5],[3,2,1],[1]];for(let n=0;n<t.length;n++){let o=function(e){let t=new i(e[0]),r=t;for(let t=1;t<e.length;t++){let n=new i(e[t]);r.next=n,r=n}return t}(t[n]),s=e(o);a().deepEqual(function(e){let t=[],r=e;for(;null!==r;)t.push(r.value),r=r.next;return t}(s),r[n])}return!0}catch(e){throw console.log("Error from reverseLinkedListHandler: ",e),Error(e)}}
